data.content: Branch feature/knots-2a30-cold-tier-edge (commit 2823f69) pushed to origin. Fixes the chronic cold_tier_imbalance warn: when a knot's id appears in both knot_hot and cold_catalog, doctor --fix now prunes the shadowed cold row instead of returning early from rehydrate. Added unit + CLI tests and verified against /Users/cartine/compactor where the repro now reports pass. make sanity clean (95.26% coverage).
